post.summary: Sign in with email and password

302.description: Redirects to Google OAuth consent screen
Sets session cookie and redirects to frontend

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text search over question text, role, category, subcategory, tags.

parameters.name: subcategory
parameters.description: Subcategory — exposed as the "Type" filter in the picker UI.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: ANY-match: rows whose tags array overlaps the given list. Send as ?tags=react,hooks or repeated.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Non-super_admin callers are forced to "active" regardless of what they pass.

parameters.name: eligibleForInterview
parameters.description: When true, only interview-eligible (active) questions are returned

get.summary: Faceted counts for the picker sidebar
get.description: Returns each filter facet (difficulty / category / subcategory / role / tags) with a per-value count. Counts respect every other filter on the request so the user sees what is still available before clicking.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text search over question text, role, category, subcategory, tags.

parameters.name: subcategory
parameters.description: Subcategory — exposed as the "Type" filter in the picker UI.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: ANY-match: rows whose tags array overlaps the given list. Send as ?tags=react,hooks or repeated.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Non-super_admin callers are forced to "active" regardless of what they pass.

parameters.name: eligibleForInterview
parameters.description: When true, only interview-eligible (active) questions are returned

post.summary: Start validation for all submitted answers

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Re-evaluate answers whose latest validation already completed. Defaults to false; in-flight validations always return 409.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Re-evaluate the answer if its latest validation already completed. Defaults to false; in-flight validations always return 409.

post.summary: Generate presigned URL for recruiter manual answer upload

get.summary: Get signed media URLs for interview answer
Get interview feedback using a share link

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Access token from the share link

post.summary: Create a shareable feedback link for an interview

delete.summary: Revoke the active shareable feedback link

info.title: Interview App API
info.description: HTTP API contract for Interview App backend

href.description: Staff app path to open the blocking interview.

pendingDeletion.description: True when deletion is scheduled because the question is still used by active interviews.

blockingInterviews.description: Present when pendingDeletion is true — active interviews still using this question.

usageCount.description: Number of times this question has been used in an interview.

total.description: Total rows matching the filter, ignoring page/limit.

count.description: Number of active questions with this value, given the rest of the current filters.

difficulties.description: Difficulty value + count, given all OTHER current filters (difficulty itself is not applied).

categories.description: Category value + count, given all OTHER current filters (category itself is not applied).

subcategories.description: Subcategory value + count, given all OTHER current filters (subcategory itself is not applied). Exposed as the "Type" facet in the picker.

roles.description: Role value + count, given all OTHER current filters (role itself is not applied).

tags.description: Tag value + count, given all OTHER current filters (tag overlap is not applied).
